MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LIN-XING XU'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.
APPEARANCES: Ethan Berry, 510/418-0190 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Terry S. Dall, Esq. of Law Office of Terry S. Dall 949/348-8007 for deft & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO DISMISS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT THE STAY WAS NOT OPERATIVE DURING THE SIX YEAR PERIOD ALLEGED BY PLAINTIFF. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO PARTICIPATE IN JUDICIAL ARBITRATION ARE ADDRESSED IN THE CIVIL CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT. Defendant will prepare a proposed form of order.
